candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A row tied to cost of revenues and shown as a separate line alongside the selected COGS bucket rather than as part of the selected row label.
Explicit operating D&A row tied to cost of revenues and shown separately in the operating section, suggesting it should be added separately to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Manually Corrected.  COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The two D&A rows appear as separate operating lines for cost of revenues, not as sublabels nested under the selected row, so they should be added separately. No summary COGS D&A row is visible, so both components are kept.
No SG&A-related depreciation or amortization rows are visible in the operating section. The only explicit D&A rows shown relate to cost of revenues, so no separate XSGA D&A should be added.
